messages.text: Hi, I tried to use the promo code 'GOLDSAVE20' on my order #12345 but it's not working.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please check if the promo code has expired?
No, I checked the website and it says the promo code is valid until February 15th.
Okay, let me check on our end. Can you please provide me with your order details again?
I already provided them to you, order #12345. Can you please just process a refund like I asked?
Alright, I'll process the refund. You should receive an email within the next 24 hours.
I appreciate it.
I'm Tonya Douglas and I'm experiencing a billing issue. My account was overcharged by $50.
Hi Tonya, sorry to hear that. I'm Agent Thompson. Can you please provide your account number so I can look into this for you?
My account number is 1423.
Thank you, Tonya. I've reviewed your account and it looks like the overcharge was due to a one-time fee that was accidentally applied. I'm going to go ahead and process a refund for you.
Okay, when can I expect the refund?
It should be processed within the next 24-48 hours. You'll receive an email with the refund details.
Thanks
Hello, my package has been lost. I ordered it on 2024-02-15 and was supposed to receive it on 2024-02-18. Can you help me find it?
Sorry to hear that, Tyler. Can you please provide your order number so I can look into this further?
My order number is #12345.
Thank you, Tyler. I've escalated this issue to our developers. They will reach out to you shortly with a solution.
That's great, but can you please tell me what the solution is? I need to track my package and find out when it will arrive.
I'm still waiting to hear back from our developers. They should contact you soon.
Okay, I appreciate it.
Hi, I'm having some issues with my recent bill. I think I've been overcharged.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please provide your account number so I can look into this for you?
It's 123456. And I've been overcharged by $50.
Thank you for providing that information. I'll just go ahead and process the refund for you.
Wait, will this affect my next month's bill? And how long will it take for me to get the refund?
Let me just check on that for you... (pause) Okay, I'm not seeing any information about the refund affecting your next month's bill.
Okay, but what about the refund timeline? When can I expect it?
I'm not sure about the refund timeline. I think it's usually processed within 7-10 business days.
Thanks. I appreciate it.
Hi, I ordered a package on January 5th, but it never arrived.
I'd be happy to help, can you please provide your order number?
My order number is #12345. I've also attached a photo of the confirmation email.
Thank you for providing that information. Let me check on the status of your package.
I've been waiting for two weeks, and I'm getting a bit frustrated. Can you please tell me what's going on?
I've checked with our shipping team, and it looks like your package was delivered to the wrong address. We're going to re-ship it to you.
That's not acceptable. I need a refund and a discount on my next purchase. This is ridiculous.
I understand your frustration, but I can only offer a one-time discount code. Would you like me to send it to you?
That's not what I asked for. Never mind.
Is there anything else I can help you with?
No, I think I'm done. Thanks
I used promo code ROSS15 on your website but it's not working. Can you please help me?
Did you try refreshing the page? Sometimes this resolves the issue.
I tried refreshing the page multiple times, and it still doesn't work. Can you check if the code is valid?
Okay, let me check. Can you please tell me your email address associated with the promo code?
My email address is cassandra.ross@example.com. I used this email to create the account.
Great! I'm going to check on some other thing. Can you please hold for 10 minutes?
I appreciate it
Hi, I need help with my billing. I was overcharged for my last month's subscription. Can you please assist me?
Hello Sandra, sorry to hear that. I'll do my best to assist you. Can you please provide me with your account ID?
It's 3456789. I've been trying to reach out to you guys for hours and no one has responded. This is ridiculous.
Thank you Sandra. I'll look into this for you. It may take a few minutes for me to find the information.
A few minutes?! I've been waiting for HOURS. This is unacceptable. Can you please escalate this to your supervisor?
I'll make sure to pass this on to my supervisor. They'll get back to you shortly.
I just want a refund for the overcharged amount. Can you please process it for me?
I'll make sure to process the refund for you. However, I need to go on a break and will get back to you within the hour.
Unbelievable. No one here seems to care about customer satisfaction. Thanks for nothing.
Hi, I'm having trouble accessing my account due to a security lock. Can you help me?
Hi Shane, sorry to hear that. Can you please confirm your account email?
My email address is shane.davis@example.com
Okay, I'm trying to reset the security lock for you. Please wait for a minute.
That's still not working. Can you check if there are any issues on your end?
I'm just going to log you out and log you back in. That usually fixes the issue.
That worked! Thanks
Hi, I'm having trouble opening your app. It just won't load no matter what I do.
Sorry to hear that. Can you try restarting your device?
I've already tried that. I've even uninstalled and reinstalled the app.
Okay, let me check on that for you. (pause)
I'm still getting the error message. Can you please help me with a refund?
Alright, I'm going to go ahead and process your refund. You should receive it within 3-5 business days.
I appreciate it. Thanks for your help, even if it was a little slow.
Hi, I tried to use my promo code but it's not working. Can you please help me?
Hi John, sorry to hear that. Can you please provide the code you are trying to use?
It's 'JOHNS15'. I entered it at checkout but it's saying it's invalid.

I'm going to check on that for you... (pause) Okay, I think I found the issue. It looks like the code is only valid for orders over $50, and your order was under that amount. Would you like me to apply a different promo code or provide a discount manually?
That makes sense. Yeah, applying a different code would be great, thanks.
Hello, I'm having issues accessing my account. I think I've been locked out due to a security lock. Can you help me?
Hi Allison, sorry to hear that. Can you please try resetting your password and see if that resolves the issue?
I already tried resetting my password, but it's not working. I'm getting an error message saying I have too many failed login attempts.
Let me check on that for you. Can you please hold for just a minute?
That's not helping. I need to get back to work. Can you escalate this to your developers now?
I'll go ahead and pass this on to our development team. They'll be in touch with you shortly.
Okay, thanks.
I'm experiencing an issue with your app, it won't open on my phone. Can you help me?
Sorry to hear that. Have you tried restarting your phone?
No, I haven't. But that usually doesn't solve the problem. Can you look into it?
Let me check the status of our servers. Can you please hold for a few minutes?
Okay... I've been holding for 10 minutes now. Can you tell me what's going on?
I see that there's an issue with our login system. I'll try to reset your password for you.
I'd rather not reset my password. Can you just fix the app so it opens?
I'm not sure if that's possible at the moment. Can I escalate this issue for you?
I don't want it escalated. I just want the app to work.
Thanks
Hello, I'd like to inquire about your pricing plans. I'm interested in upgrading to a higher tier, but I'm concerned about the lack of API access.
Oh, hi there! Let me check on that for you. Can you give me a minute?
I've been using your service for a while now, and I'm starting to outgrow the limitations of the current plan. I'd like to know if it's possible to get API access with the higher tier.
Okay, let me just look into that real quick. Can you hold for just a sec?
I really need API access to automate some of our processes. Can you tell me if this is something you can offer?
Sorry about the wait! Unfortunately, our higher tier doesn't include API access. But we do have a workaround using Zapier that might be able to help you out.
That sounds like a lot of extra work. Is there any flexibility with the pricing plans?
I'm not sure about that. I'd have to check with our team. Let me go check on that for you.
I appreciate it.
Hi, my account is locked and I'm having trouble accessing it. Can you help me?
Please check if you're on the right website. Sometimes our website can be slow. Can you try refreshing the page?
I've checked the website multiple times. I'm still having trouble. I've tried restarting my browser and computer too.
Okay, can you try typing your password upside down and then right side up? Sometimes that works for us.
That doesn't make sense. I'm just trying to access my account like I normally do. Can you give me more helpful advice?
I'm sorry you're having trouble. Can you try calling our phone number and we'll help you there?
Fine. Thanks for trying.
Hi, I'm having some trouble with your app. It won't open on my phone.
I need help urgently, can you please assist me?
Hello Jonathan, sorry to hear that you're experiencing issues with our app. Can you please restart your phone and try opening it again?
I've already tried that, it's not working. Can you please escalate this issue?
Can you please send me a screenshot of the error message you're seeing?
I'm not getting an error message, it just won't open. I need help ASAP.
Okay, I'm going to check on some other things. Can you please hold for just a minute?
I've been waiting for 15 minutes, can you please give me an update?
Sorry Jonathan, I've been stuck in a meeting. I'll look into it as soon as I can.
Thanks
Hi, I'm trying to use a promo code on your website, but it's not working. Can you help?
Hi Christina, thanks for reaching out. Can you please provide more details about the issue?
I entered the code on the checkout page, but it says it's invalid. The code is 'SUMMER20'.
I'm looking into it. Can you please try checking your email for a confirmation email from us?
I already checked my email, and there's nothing about a promo code. Can you try to check on your end?
I've checked, and it looks like the issue is on your end. Can you please try clearing your browser cache?
That worked. The promo code is now working. Thanks
Hi, I'd like to cancel my subscription.
Okay, let me check on that for you.
I'm trying to get a refund. Can you help me with that?
Yeah, sure thing. Can you please provide your subscription ID so I can look into it?
I don't have it on hand, but I can try to find it. Can you just hold for a minute?
Alright, we've processed your refund. You should see it on your account shortly.
Thanks
Hi, my package hasn't arrived yet. The tracking says it's been delivered, but I haven't received it. Can you help me with this?
Sorry to hear that, I'll check on it. Can you please provide me with your order number?
My order number is #1234. It was shipped on the 10th of February.
Okay, I've checked your order. It seems there was a mistake with the delivery address. I'm going to re-send it to you today.
That's great, thank you for letting me know. Can you confirm the new delivery date?
Your package will be delivered tomorrow between 10am and 6pm. You'll receive a confirmation email with the tracking information.
Thanks
Hi, I'm Valerie Thompson. I ordered a package on 2024-01-02 but it hasn't arrived yet. Can you help me track it?
Hi Valerie, thank you for reaching out to us. Let me check on your package for you. Can you please provide your order number?
My order number is #12345. I've been waiting for 4 days now. Can you please expedite the delivery?
Thank you Valerie. I've checked on your package and it seems there was a delay due to weather conditions. It should arrive within 2-3 business days. In the meantime, you can track it here: [link]
But I've already tracked it, and it shows it was delivered on the 4th. I'm starting to think it was lost or misplaced by your company. Can you please escalate this to your team?
I'm going to pass this on to our developers. They will review the issue and get back to you within 24 hours. Please note that this may take some time.
That's it? No investigation or resolution? Just a handoff to developers without any plan of action or communication?
I apologize if you feel that way, Valerie. I'm doing my best to help you. I'll make sure the developers review your case and get back to you soon.
Thanks
Hi, I'm having some issues accessing my account. I think it's been locked due to a security breach.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please try resetting your password?
I already tried that. It just says my account is locked and I need to contact support.
Okay, can you please confirm your account details so I can look into this further?
My account email is matthew.bailey@example.com. I'm still getting the same error message.
Alright, I've checked your account and it looks like everything is fine. You should be able to access it now.
Thanks. I appreciate it. But I'm still not getting in.
Hi, I'm having a billing issue. I was overcharged $100. Can you help me with a refund?
Hi Diana, sorry to hear that. Can you please provide your order number so I can look into this further?
My order number is #12345. I've been trying to reach support for a week, and I just got an automated email saying someone would contact me. Still nothing.
I've checked on your order and it looks like you requested a feature that's not available on our premium plan. You were charged extra for the feature, but it's not something we offer.
But I asked for it, and your support team said it was possible. This is ridiculous. Can I speak to your supervisor?
I can try to escalate this for you, but I don't think we can offer a refund for the feature. It's not something we can provide.
I appreciate it.
Hi, I'm trying to use a promo code but it's not working. Can you help me out?
I'm happy to help you. Can you please restart your browser and try again?
I've restarted my browser multiple times. It's still not working. Can you tell me what the promo code is for?
It looks like you're in the wrong region. Can you try accessing the website through a VPN?
I understand that I need to be in the correct region, but I'm already in the US. I'm starting to get frustrated.
Sorry to hear that. Can you try using a different browser?
I've tried multiple browsers. Can you escalate this issue to a supervisor?
I'll see what I can do. Can you please hold for just a minute?
Thanks for your help, I appreciate it.
Hi, I'm Jackie Johnson. I was expecting a package that was supposed to arrive yesterday, but it's nowhere to be found. Can you help me track it down?
Sorry to hear that, Jackie. Can you please provide your order number so I can assist you further?
It's #JACK123, and I've already checked the tracking info online. It says it was delivered to an incorrect address, but I know that's not right. Please help me figure out what happened.
Okay, let me check on that for you. Can you please hold for a few minutes while I look into it?
Umm... 5 minutes have already passed. Can you give me an update?
Sorry about the wait, Jackie. I'm still looking into it. Can you please confirm your address so I can verify the delivery info?
Seriously? You can't even verify the address I provided earlier? I'm really starting to get frustrated here.
I apologize if it seems like I'm not doing enough, Jackie. I'm doing my best to assist you. Can you please give me a bit more time?
Fine. I'll give you more time. But please, just give me an update when you can.
Thank you, Jackie. I'll be back with an update shortly.
Thanks
I tried to use a promo code but it's not working. Can you help me?
Sorry to hear that. Can you please send me the promo code and the product you're trying to purchase?
The code is 'JOHNSON10' and I'm trying to buy a new laptop.
I'm checking on the code... (long pause) Ah, yeah. I think it's because the code is only valid for a specific product line. Can you try using it with our X series laptops?
That worked! Thanks
Hi, I'm having trouble accessing my account. It's saying it's locked due to security reasons.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please try resetting your password?
I've already tried that. It says my account is locked because of security reasons. Can you please help me?
I'm going to transfer you to our security team. They'll be able to help you further.
I've been on hold for 10 minutes and I still haven't spoken to anyone. Can you please cancel the order and refund me?
I apologize for the inconvenience. I've processed the refund for you immediately. You should receive the refund within the next 3-5 business days.
Thanks for helping me with this issue, I appreciate it.
I'm trying to open the app, but it's not working. Can you help me?
Sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what error message you're seeing?
No error message. It just doesn't open.
Try uninstalling and reinstalling the app. That usually fixes the issue.
That didn't work. I'm getting a 'connection timed out' message now.
Okay, let me check on that. Can you please try again in a few minutes?
I tried again, and it's still not working. Can you escalate this to someone else?
I'm going to go ahead and transfer you to our tech support team. They should be able to help you further.
Thanks
Hi, I've been charged twice for my subscription this month. Can you help me get a refund?
Okay, let me check on that for you. Can you please provide your order number?
It's #12345. I can see the charges in my account.
Thanks for providing the order number. I'm going to escalate this to our developers. They'll look into it and get back to you within 24 hours.
That's frustrating. I really need this resolved ASAP. Can you give me an update on the status?
I've checked with our developers, and they're still looking into it. I'll check back with you tomorrow.
Okay, thanks I appreciate it.
I need to cancel my subscription.
Okay, no problem. I'm here to help. To cancel your subscription, can you please provide your account ID?
Great, thank you. I'm going to go ahead and cancel your subscription. However, please note that it might take up to 7 days to process.
What about my ongoing project? Will I still have access to it?
I'm not sure about that. Let me check on it. (pause) Yeah, you should still have access to your project.
I appreciate it. But how do I know for sure? Can I get a confirmation email?
Of course, I'll send you an email. But like I said, your project access should still be available.
Thanks.
You're welcome, have a great day!
Hello, I never received my package that was shipped on 2024-02-05. Can you please help me?
Sorry to hear that. Can you please provide your order number?
It's #12345. Can you also let me know the status of my package?
We're looking into it. Can you please give us a bit more time to check on your package?
That's not what I was hoping to hear. Can you at least give me an estimated time of delivery or a refund?
I'm going to escalate this to our shipping team. You should receive an update within the next 24-48 hours.
That's not a very helpful answer. Can I speak to your supervisor?
I'm doing my best to assist you. I'll make sure to pass along your concerns.
Thanks
Hello, I'm trying to track my package but it says it was delivered on 2024-01-10, but I know I wasn't home that day. Can you help me?
I see that your package was delivered on 2024-01-10. Can you please check with your neighbors to see if they received it for you?
But I already asked my neighbors and they haven't seen it. Can you please check the tracking information again? It's possible there was an error.
I'm still showing that the package was delivered on 2024-01-10. Have you checked with your local post office to see if they have it?
I just called the post office and they said they don't have it. Can you please escalate this issue and find out what happened to my package?
An investigation has been opened for this issue. You will receive an update within 24-48 hours. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
No, that's all. Thanks
Hi, my account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please help me regain access.
Hello Brian, I'm here to assist you. Can you please provide your account details so I can look into this further?
My username is brian.davis and my email is bdavis@email.com. Please hurry, I have an urgent deadline.
Thanks for providing your details. I'll need to check on some security protocols. Can you please hold for a few more minutes?
A few more minutes?! I've already been waiting for 5 minutes. I really need to resolve this ASAP.
I understand your urgency, Brian. I'm still checking on some security protocols. Can you please confirm your account creation date?
January 1st, 2020. Look, I'd appreciate it if you could escalate this to your supervisor or something.
I'm going to transfer you to our security team. They'll be able to assist you further. Please hold for a moment.
Thanks
Hi, I'm experiencing some issues with my current pricing plan. I need more storage space and I'm not sure which plan to choose.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please confirm which plan you're currently on?
I'm on the basic plan. But I'm not sure if it's the right one for me.
Okay, let me check on the storage limits for the basic plan.
How much storage do I have available on the basic plan?
It looks like you have 5GB of storage available. Would you like to upgrade to a higher plan?
That sounds like a lot. But I really need more than that. Can you check if there's any other options?
Okay, let me check. Actually, you might want to consider our custom plan. I can send you more information on that.
That sounds interesting. Can you send me the info?
I'll send you an email with the details. Hope this helps!
Thanks
Hi, I'm having some issues with my current pricing plan. Can you help me understand the limitations?
Hi Brett, can you please provide more details about your issue?
I'm trying to use the advanced feature, but it's not working as expected. I think it's because of the plan I'm on.
Let me check on that for you. (pause)
I've been trying to get this resolved for days, and I'm getting frustrated. Can you please escalate this to someone who can help?
Sorry to hear that, Brett. I'm going to process a refund for you. You should receive it immediately.
Thanks for taking care of that.
Hi, I'm Daniel Daniel. I've been charged an extra $50 on my latest bill. Can you please help me with this issue?
Hi Daniel, sorry to hear that. Can you please check if the extra charge is applied to the correct account?
Yes, the extra charge is applied to my account. I've checked my account summary.
Okay, let me check on this. Can you please hold for a few minutes?
Okay, I'm still on hold.
Hi Daniel, I've checked on your account and it seems like there was a mistake with the billing. I've processed a refund for the extra $50.
That's great, thank you for your help. I really appreciate it.
Hi, I'm having issues with the pricing plan. Some features seem to be limited. Can you help me understand what's going on?
I can help you with that. Can you please send me a screenshot of the issue you're experiencing?
Here's a screenshot. As you can see, I'm missing the ability to add custom fields to my patient profiles.
I see the issue now. Unfortunately, our developers are currently on holiday and won't be able to fix it until they return.
That's a long time. Can't you escalate this to someone who can help me sooner?
I've escalated the issue to our development team. They will review it and get back to me. I'll update you once I hear back.
Thanks
Hi, I'm having some issues with my current pricing plan. It seems like I'm running into some feature limitations.
I apologize for the inconvenience, let me see what I can do to help. Can you tell me more about the features you're trying to use?
Well, I'm trying to use the advanced analytics tool, but it's saying I don't have the necessary permissions.
I'm looking into this for you. Can you please confirm your account information so I can check on your plan details?
I've already confirmed my account information multiple times. I'm starting to get frustrated with this process.
Okay, I'll escalate this to our support team. Someone will reach out to you within the next 24 hours.
Thanks. I appreciate it.

I'm reaching out to cancel my subscription to your service. I've been a paying customer for over a year, but I'm extremely disappointed in the lack of development on the feature I requested last year.
Hi Terri, thanks for reaching out. I'm here to help. Can you please provide more information about the feature you're referring to?

It's the ability to customize the dashboard layout. I've been waiting for it for months, and I've seen it mentioned in old blog posts from last year. It's really frustrating that it's still not available.
Sorry to hear that, Terri. Let me see if I can help you with that. Can you hold for just a minute while I check on the status?
I've been holding for 5 minutes already, and I still haven't heard back from you. Can you please escalate this to someone who can actually help me?
Sorry about the delay, Terri. It looks like you're still within your trial period, so you're not eligible for cancellation. Is there anything else I can help you with?
That's not what I'm asking for. I want to cancel my subscription because of the lack of development on this feature. Can you please just cancel it?
Okay, let me check on that for you. Can you please hold for just another minute?
Thanks
Hello, I'm Ronald Gallagher. I ordered a package on January 25th, but it hasn't arrived yet. The tracking number is #G12345. Can you help me locate it?
Thank you for reaching out to us, Ronald. Can you please confirm your order date again? And also, can you check with your neighbors if they have received the package by mistake?
I already confirmed the order date with you. And no, my neighbors haven't received the package. The tracking number still shows it's 'in transit'. Can you look into this further?
Okay, let me check on that. Can you please send me a picture of the package you were expecting?
I don't have a picture of the package. But I can describe it to you. It's a brown box with a red sticker on the side.
Okay, got it. I'll look into this further. Can you please wait for 2-3 business days and check the tracking number again?
Wait, what? You're telling me to wait 2-3 business days? But I've already waited over a week and the package still hasn't arrived. Can you escalate this to someone who can actually help me?
I apologize for the inconvenience, Ronald. I'm going to transfer you to our manager. Please wait for a minute while I do that.
Thanks
I've been charged twice for my subscription. I need a refund ASAP. My order number is #12345.
Hi Jonathan, thank you for reaching out. I'll look into this for you.
I'm getting a bit worried. I need an update on my case. It's been 2 minutes and I've already waited 5 minutes on the phone.
I'm still checking on this. Can you please hold for just a minute?
Unacceptable. I've been waiting for 6 minutes now. Can I speak to your supervisor?
Okay, let me just check some things. (pause) Okay, I've checked on this.
What's the update? I'm still waiting for a refund.
I'm still working on it. Can you please hold for just a minute?
I'm done with this conversation. I appreciate it.
Hi, I'm having trouble accessing my account. I keep getting a security lock error.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please try resetting your password?
I've already tried resetting my password. It's not working.
Okay, let me check on this for you. (pause)
(no response from agent, waiting)
I think I found the issue. Please try logging in with a different browser.
That worked! Thanks
Hello, I'm having a billing issue. I was charged more than I should have this month.
Hello Shane, I'm here to help. Can you please provide your account details?
My account number is 12345. And I already paid the excess amount back to the company.
Okay, I'll process the refund. Can you please wait for a few minutes?
It's been 10 minutes and I still haven't received the refund. Can you check on this?
I'll check on it again. Hold on.
I'm not seeing any updates. Can you please escalate this issue?
The refund has been processed. You should receive it immediately.
Thanks.
Hi, I'm trying to use the promo code you sent me but it's not working.
Sorry to hear that. Can you please check if the promo code is correctly entered?
Yes, I've double-checked and it's correct. Can you check your end?
Okay, I'm going to try something else. Can you please try applying the promo code again and then click on 'Apply'?
I did that and it worked! Thanks!
Hi, I'm having trouble opening the app. It won't launch on my phone.
Sorry to hear that, Jennifer. Can you try restarting your phone?
I've tried restarting my phone multiple times already. That doesn't seem to be the issue.
Okay... um... Can you check the app store to make sure it's updated?
Yes, I've checked and it's updated. This is getting frustrating.
Sorry to hear that. Let me just... uh... check on this real quick.
I've been waiting for 20 minutes. Can I speak to a supervisor?
Okay, I'm going to escalate this to our devs. They'll be in touch with you soon.
Thanks. I appreciate it.
I'm having trouble opening the app. It keeps crashing.
Sorry to hear that, Marie. Can you restart your device and try opening the app again?
I've restarted my phone multiple times already. It still won't open.
Okay... can you tell me more about your device and the app version you're using?
I'm using an iPhone 13 with the latest iOS update. The app version is 3.5.2.
Alright, it sounds like that should be working. Let me just check some things on my end.
Thanks, but the issue still persists. Can you escalate this to a supervisor or someone who can actually help me?
Hi, I'm having an issue with my promo code. It's not working. Can you help me?
Hi Sarah, sorry to hear that. Can you please provide the promo code you're trying to use and the order number associated with it?
It's code COX15 and my order number is 12345. I just ordered yesterday.
Okay, thank you for providing that information. Let me just check on it for you.
I've been trying to use the code for hours and it keeps saying it's not valid. Can you please hurry up?
I'm going to go ahead and escalate this to our promotions team. Someone will be in touch with you shortly.
That's it? That's all you can do? I need help now.
Thanks
Hi, I tried using promo code 'WELCOME15' at checkout but it's not working. Can you help?
Great that you tried using the promo code. Can you please check if the code is entered in all capital letters?
I've checked, it's definitely uppercase. I've tried typing it in, copying and pasting it, and even using the code on a different device.
Are you sure you're using the correct browser? Sometimes promo codes don't work in Internet Explorer.
I'm not using Internet Explorer, I'm using Chrome on a Mac. This is really frustrating, can you help me now?
One last thing, try clearing your browser cache and then try the promo code again.
Thanks for your help, I appreciate it. I'll try clearing my cache.
